parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='GENERATING', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.channel_id, job_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id, audio_content_b64: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.audio_content_b64, audio_file_path: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.audio_file_path, filename: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.filename, caption: '🔊 TTS 완료본입니다. 승인하면 WF-12(HeyGen)로 진행됩니다.', include_wf12_button: true }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='APPROVED', audio_url='{{ $('Send TTS Audio to Gateway').item.json.audio_url || $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.audio_file_path }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id, channel_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.channel_id, user_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.user_id, audio_file_path: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.audio_file_path, audio_url: $('Send TTS Audio to Gateway').item.json.audio_url || $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.audio_file_path }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.channel_id, text: '🔊 TTS 완료. 오디오 확인 후 버튼으로 WF-12 진행 여부를 선택하세요.' }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='FAILED', error_message='WF-11 TTS 실패: {{ $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.error }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.channel_id, text: '❌ TTS 생성에 실패했습니다.\nJob ID: ' + $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id.substring(0,8) + '\n오류: ' + $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.error }) }}
